Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Lauren Aros of the law offices of Clerkin, Sinclair & Mahfouz, LLP (619-308-6550) appears by telephone as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Paul Masangcay (415-815-7142) appears In Propria Persona as self-represented defendant/non-opposing party

The cause is submitted by both sides without argument. Defendant indicates his intention to make payments per settlement agreement.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: torreanom@aol.com (L&M302)

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Self-represented defendant, Paul Masangcay (415-815-7142) appears 'In Propria Persona' as responding party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court sets aside the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment is CONTINUED to March 23, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302.

Clerk notifies plaintiff counsel, Richard L. Mahfouz's office by telephone at (619) 308-6550. Clerk also calls defendant In Pro Per. Defendant waives further written notice.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: torreanom@aol.com (L&M302)
